{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Subspace storage device
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Subspace storage device]] is an expensive piece of [[Aethertech]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c20">''The Captain'', chapter 20</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon artifacts]]
